svg.title: Homelab network topology diagram
svg.desc: Network topology showing ISP modem, Proxmox host with OPNsense VM, security lab VMs, and NAS, connected to an access point serving wired and wireless clients, with WireGuard VPN remote access

g.text: Dual-port Intel I350 NIC · onboard management NIC
Routing · firewall · DHCP · Unbound DNS · Suricata IDS
GeoIP blocking · DNS over TLS · Let's Encrypt cert
Debian · Nextcloud · Jellyfin · 8 TB storage · file, video & music sharing
